curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The primary vulnerability is in src/infra/archive.ts in openZipOutputFile, which validated output paths then opened files with O_TRUNC in a separate step, creating a TOCTOU race window. The secondary location is src/infra/fs-safe.ts in openWritableFileWithinRoot, which had a similar race between stat/lstat and realpath resolution. The fix hardens both paths by binding writes to opened file handle identity, deferring truncation until after boundary checks, and adding fd-based realpath verification. Advisory explicitly names both files. 2 non-test source files changed (not noisy).
